summary: Frontend-only review of iteration: Trending reorder + all-8-topics-visible, Explicit auto-tag (confession+profanity), Music Share card. 6 of 7 features pass. Critical bug found in Landing trending top-up logic — when API returns two posts of the same topic (currently music), the fallback dedup logic does NOT collapse same-topic API posts, and the final `slice(0, 8)` drops the lowest-priority topic. Observed DOM order at home: [crypto, music, music, mental-health, confession, sports, memes, rant] — `stories` is missing AND `mental-health`/`confession` are pushed to ranks 3-4 instead of 2-3, violating the spec. All other tests pass: Explicit badge on 30/30 confession PostCards; 12/32 rant PostCards auto-tagged for profanity; trending-explicit-{id} renders on confession trending row; Music page has share button on 30/30 cards; ShareCardModal title is 'Share this track' for music and 'Share this pluck' for posts; all 7 social/action testids present; YouTube cards (30/30) correctly hide open-{id} link (regression OK); topics grid order [crypto, music, mental-health, confession, sports, memes, rant, stories] is correct.

ui_bugs.issue: Top-up + slice(0,8) drops a topic when the API trending list contains multiple posts of the same topic. Observed: API returned 2 music posts, so the final trending list became [crypto, music, music, mental-health, confession, sports, memes, rant] — `stories` was dropped, and mental-health/confession landed at positions 3/4 instead of the spec-required 2/3.

action_items: Fix /app/frontend/src/pages/Landing.jsx trendList — dedupe by topic BEFORE top-up + slice(0,8). Keep only the first API post per topic, then top-up missing topics from FALLBACK_POSTS. This guarantees all 8 topics are present and lands them at the correct rank.

Suggested patch (inside trendList IIFE):  const sourceRaw = (trending.length ? trending : []).slice();  const seen = new Set();  const source = [];  for (const p of sourceRaw) { if (!seen.has(p.topic)) { seen.add(p.topic); source.push(p); } }  for (const fb of FALLBACK_POSTS) { if (!seen.has(fb.topic)) { seen.add(fb.topic); source.push(fb); } }   then keep the existing sort + slice(0,8). Result will deterministically be exactly 8 rows with all 8 topics in priority order.
critical_code_review_comments: Landing.jsx: dedup-by-topic is missing from trendList. When the API returns >1 post of the same topic (common for `music` since music-chatter bot floods the feed), the slice(0,8) silently drops lower-priority topics. Fix is a 5-line pre-dedup pass before the existing top-up loop.
MusicCard.jsx Share button + ExplicitBadge wiring is clean — props passed to ShareCardModal include hugs/fugs/cover so the canvas renders the right state.
ShareCardModal.jsx correctly branches `isMusic` based on presence of track prop. MusicCanvasBody renders cover (420x420), title (clamped), artist, optional caption — meets spec.
explicit.js word list is reasonable; `\b` boundaries avoid scunthorpe-style false positives. `isExplicitPost` always flags confession topic — verified 30/30 in DOM.
ExplicitBadge.jsx exposes a `testId` prop so it can render with distinct selectors (`trending-explicit-{id}`, `explicit-badge-{postId}`, `music-explicit-{trackId}`) — good for test coverage.

success_rate.frontend: 85% (6/7 specced features pass; trending top-up has a dedup bug that breaks two assertions: 'all 8 topics visible' and 'rank 0-3 = crypto/music/mental-health/confession')

test_credentials: Mod key: pluto-mod-2026. Anonymous device-ID flow otherwise.
seed_data_creation: None — relied on existing API content (music-chatter bot posts visible).
context_for_next_testing_agent: After main agent fixes Landing.jsx trendList dedupe, re-verify: (1) trending DOM order first 4 must be [crypto, music, mental-health, confession]; (2) set of topics across 8 rows must equal {crypto, music, mental-health, confession, sports, memes, rant, stories}; (3) confession row still has trending-explicit-* badge. All other tests already pass: confession PostCards 30/30 explicit, rant PostCards 12/32 explicit, music-share-btn on 30/30 music cards, ShareCardModal music vs post titles, 7 social testids present, YouTube open-{id} hidden on 30/30 YT cards, topics-grid order correct. Preview at https://safeguard-eval.preview.emergentagent.com. Use selectors: [data-testid^='trending-row-'] -> inner h3 text minus '#'. Note: music-chatter bot keeps seeding music posts so duplicate-music in API trending is a recurring condition.
rca of the issue: Landing.jsx (lines 138-162) builds trendList = (sort API_posts ∪ fallback_for_missing_topics) then slice(0,8). The top-up only adds a fallback when topic not in seenTopics. But seenTopics tracks API-side duplicates as already-seen, so no fallback for `stories` is added when `music` already appears twice in the API result. Resulting source array length = 8 (e.g., 2 music + 6 others), all 8 surface after sort, but the duplicate music shifts the missing topic (stories) out of the window. Mitigation: pre-dedup API posts by topic (keep first occurrence) BEFORE top-up. This guarantees 8 unique topics in source and preserves priority order.
